name: Elevated Command Prompt Activity by Non-Admin User Detected
description: Detects the execution of an elevated command prompt (cmd.exe) by a user who is not a member of a privileged group. This can indicate an.attempt to gain unauthorized access or perform privileged actions.

prompts.prompt: Elevated command prompt activity by a non-administrative user detected. Event Details: **Timestamp** {Timestamp}, **Event ID** {EventID}, **User** {user}, **Process Name** {process_name}, **Parent Process Name** {parent_process_name}, **Command** {command}, **Token Elevation Type** {token_elevation_type}. Investigate this high-risk activity immediately for unauthorized privilege escalation.

parameters.name: EventID
parameters.description: The Event ID for process creation (4688).

parameters.name: user
parameters.description: The user account who ran the elevated command prompt.

parameters.name: command
parameters.description: The command line used to execute cmd.exe.

parameters.name: token_elevation_type
parameters.description: The token elevation type, indicating if the process is elevated.
